title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Persistent Systems - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Persistent Systems - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Persistent Systems, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Persistent Systems:
Persistent Systems is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Persistent Systems!
